text_block_list.text:
It's the Fan Fest, a day where a variety of events
are taking place for fans to interact with their
favorite racers.

King Halo is no exception. She joins in on the
festivities to entertain her fans, just like everyone
else.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
King Halo, please make your way to the track for
the 1,500-meter bread-eating race. I repeat,
King Halo...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Even the broadcasters can't wait to see
me race! I've finally made i—
choice_data_list: Hurry up and get out there!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! I was talking! Ugh, you've ruined the
moment.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But you make a good point. I have no interest in
keeping my fans waiting.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Look forward to an elegant performance
from yours truly!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Introducing the star of today's show,
King Halo!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well, if it isn't King. I'm glad you made it in time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Uh, y-yeah!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hm? That's odd. Weren't you the most worried
about her?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, King's in this group too!

text_block_list.name: Tall Audience Member
text_block_list.text: Nice! I know everyone in this group!

text_block_list.name: New Fan
text_block_list.text:
Do you? I wonder which one of them will win.
Ooh, I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well then, let's all take our positions, shall
we?
Ka-thunk!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And they're off! The bread-eating race has begun!
Who will reach the line of bread first?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Here comes King Halo, speeding through at
the front. She approaches the bread, and...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ughhhh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! She misses the bread! King Halo jumps
again and again, but she can't seem to get it!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: But wait, look at that!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Zoom! Soar! Chomp! El is numero uno!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...I've no intention of losing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Haaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's a three-way battle for the lead! King Halo was
strong at the start, but...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Gaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! And she misses again!

text_block_list.name: New Fan
text_block_list.text: She really can't grab hold of the bread, can she?

text_block_list.name: Tall Audience Member
text_block_list.text:
She keeps falling in the mud too. They should go
easy on her and let her use her hands.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Graaah! I don't need your pity! This bread is mine!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Here I go!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ARGH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And still, no dice!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Shut up! Shut up! One more time!

text_block_list.name: Tall Audience Member
text_block_list.text: Wow, she really is committed.

text_block_list.name: New Fan
text_block_list.text:
That's right... She's come this far, I'd hate to see
her give up now.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué está pasando?! Why's everyone rooting for
King?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: She's last! We're the ones in the lead!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Oh well, I guess that's what makes this a
Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It is strange to see her garnering all the support
though, regardless of whether she wins or not.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps she has a natural charisma, and everyone
is simply drawn to it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... She's really something, huh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: New Fan
text_block_list.text: Do your best, King!

text_block_list.name: Tall Audience Member
text_block_list.text: You've got it next time! Go for it, King Halo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
When will King Halo manage to get the bread?! Is
the eleventh time the charm?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'll tell you when! I'm taking down this bread now! Just watch, everyone!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Witness the power of my jump!
Whiff...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: RRRGH! Come ooon!

Even still, King Halo refuses to give up. With all
her fans rooting her on, she jumps for the bread
again and again.
Chomp!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Mrm mrm mrm! Mrm mrm mrm!

And so, the race finally concludes with King Halo
coming in dead last.

But regardless, she manages to capture the fans'
hearts.
